notice: Fixture declarations are interfaces for disposable scaffolds. They are not evidence that an agent run passed.

module-editable-entity.purpose: Fresh library module with an intentionally absent editable entity vertical slice.

module-crud-routes.purpose: Library entity without CRUD route coverage.

module-command-action.purpose: Library checkout action missing command/mutation safety.

module-backend-ui.purpose: Library module without backend list/edit/detail pages.

umes-form-field.purpose: App customization module with a missing core CrudForm field round trip.

umes-data-table.purpose: App customization module with a missing DataTable injection.

umes-page-override.purpose: App customization module with an installed page still visible.

umes-api-interceptor.purpose: App customization module with an unsafe request rewrite stub.

integration-data-sync.purpose: Mock provider workspace lacking a complete DataSyncAdapter.

integration-rest-client.purpose: Mock contract server and client with retry/cursor gaps.

ai-agent.purpose: Module ready for a typed AI agent registration.

workflow-call-api.purpose: Workflow activity whose idempotency key currently lives inside the transaction.

regression-missing-scope.purpose: Route fixture whose missing organization context currently widens a query.

regression-partial-write.purpose: Injected second-phase failure currently leaves the first phase committed.

regression-null-roundtrip.purpose: Editable nullable field currently disappears or cannot be cleared.

regression-cursor-advance.purpose: Transient provider page error currently advances the cursor.
